title: Cookie Policy
intro: We only use technical cookies for user authentication and proper site operation.
refresh: • refreshToken — stores the authorization token required for automatic login. Stored for 7 days in an HttpOnly cookie.
session: • sessionStorage — temporarily stores user, team, UI state, and cards. Cleared on browser close.
not_used: What cookies we do not use
not_used_text: We do not use cookies for advertising, analytics, or tracking. No cookies are shared with third parties.
disable_text: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but it may limit site functionality, including login.
contact_text: If you have questions, please contact us at: example@yourdomain.com
text: We use technical cookies for authentication and to make the site work properly.
